.3,\\n            end_factor=1.0,\\n            total_iters=max(total_steps, 1),\\n        )\\n    warmup = optim.lr_scheduler.LinearLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        start_factor=0.3,\\n        end_factor=1.0,\\n        total_iters=warmup_steps,\\n    )\\n    cosine = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1),\\n    )\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.SequentialLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        schedulers=[warmup, cosine],\\n        milestones=[warmup_steps],\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget more effectively with a short warmup plus cosine decay, paired with AdamW and a stronger learning-rate/weight-decay setting that is typically better matched to MLP optimization on CIFAR-10.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\"]}"}}
